title: leontodon simplex
intro: Leontodon simplex, also known as autumn hawk's-beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leontodon simplex include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Leontodon simplex can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments due to its medicinal properties.
